summary: resolve+send pipeline gluing interpolation, secrets, SigV4, engine and history
commands: resolve_and_send(request: StoredRequest, environment_id: Option<String>) -> Result<ResponseData, String>
resolve_preview_curl(request: StoredRequest, environment_id: Option<String>) -> Result<String, String>
pure_functions: build_render_ctx(envs, id, flat, redact) -> Result<RenderCtx, String>
design_notes: Env inheritance flattened base->sub (target wins); inheritance cycles broken by a visited set.
Secrets fetched per-name from Keychain via secrets::secret_get; redact mode substitutes ••• and never reads the Keychain (used by preview_curl).
URL structure rendered as RawText so an interpolated host:port is not corrupted; appended query params percent-encoded once; RequestSpec.query_params left empty so the engine does not double-encode.
Headers -> Header target (rejects CRLF), JSON body -> JsonBody target, other raw bodies -> RawText, auth material -> RawText.
SigV4 signed over the resolved spec, headers folded in, then auth downgraded to None so the engine does not re-sign (avoids resolving credentials twice).
History persisted by the engine only; this module never touches the history table.
preview_curl returns a readable error when curlgen::to_curl is still a stub ('not implemented').

verification.e2e: resolve_and_send tested against a local std::net TcpListener server with {{env.host}} in the URL (offline, loopback)
